title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICRA Advisory Limited - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICRA Advisory Limited - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, ICRA Advisory Limited in Faridabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICRA Advisory Limited:
ICRA Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICRA Advisory Limited!
